title: ChicaChica Redstone
description: Simple resource pack that makes it easy to see that power is on.
body:
# ChicaChica Redstone
Simple resource pack that makes it easy to see that power is on.

![Comparison image of when the power is turned on and when it is turned off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ace547134990a8fcc6902c21e1b16eb57d8c0ebd.png)
## Support blocks
- Observer
- Hopper
- Dropper
- Dispenser
- Piston
- StickyPiston
- NoteBlock
- Tripwire
- TripwireHook
## Credits
Hopper, stickypiston, and observer are created based on the following resource pack.Thank you so much!
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks)
## Link
𝕏(twitter): [https://x.com/Robot_0005](https://x.com/Robot_0005)
